description: Loop Engineer cron configuration for Hermes Agent

loops.name: support-triage
loops.prompt: Pull tickets from the past hour. Triage and handle them according to the support-triage skill. Read loop-engineer/loops/support/README.md for contract. Write artifacts to loop-engineer/artifacts/.

loops.name: seo-content
loops.prompt: Check Search Console for keyword gaps, traffic drops, 404s. Check Ahrefs for competitor gaps. Create signals and tasks per SEO loop contract. Read loop-engineer/loops/seo/README.md. Write to loop-engineer/artifacts/.

loops.name: product-growth-correlation
loops.prompt: Read all signals from past 24h from loop-engineer/artifacts/signals/. Cross-reference with Vercel Analytics. Create conversion-friction signals and prioritized tasks. Read loop-engineer/loops/product-growth/README.md.

loops.name: security-scan
loops.prompt: Run npm audit, check GitHub Dependabot alerts, scan Vercel logs for auth anomalies, check droplet auth logs. Create tickets for CVEs > medium, tasks for updates, auth-anomaly signals. Read loop-engineer/loops/security/README.md.

loops.name: database-health
loops.prompt: SSH to droplet, run pg_stat_statements for slow queries, check unused indexes, table bloat, backup status. Create slow-query signals and db-optimization tasks. Read loop-engineer/loops/database/README.md.
